3404986681.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contributions WHERE (((tags @> $1) OR (tags @> $2 AND (tags @> $3 OR tags @> $4)) OR (tags @> $5) OR (tags @> $6) OR (tags @> $7 AND tags @> $8) OR (tags ? $9 AND NOT tags @> $10) OR (tags @> $11)) AND (status_geom_type).geom_type = 'LineString')

1664345319.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contributions WHERE (((tags @> $1) OR (tags @> $2 AND (tags @> $3 OR tags @> $4)) OR (tags @> $5) OR (tags @> $6) OR (tags @> $7 AND tags @> $8) OR (tags ? $9 AND NOT tags @> $10) OR (tags @> $11)) AND (status_geom_type).geom_type = 'LineString')
